scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern (temp_model, deploy, wait with all_active) is correct. Doesn't show the combined all_active + all_agents_idle pattern from the gold standard, but the basic deploy/wait pattern is fully correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout set as an instance attribute is suspicious — the gold standard only shows timeout= as a parameter to juju.wait(), not as an attribute on the Juju object. Minor potential fabrication.
